title: helichrysum stellatum
intro: Helichrysum stellatum, also known as the starry curry plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum stellatum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
